title: Project Timeline Creator
scenario: Create a simple project timeline for a project that includes 4 milestones. The timeline should include the milestone name, start date, and end date. The timeline should be formatted as a table.
constraints: Must be under 200 characters per row

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the timeline meets the constraints of having 4 milestones and being under 200 characters per row.
Check if the timeline is formatted as a table.
Check if each milestone includes the correct information (name, start date, end date).
